title: Deduplicate quadlet and .app file removal logic
body:
- [x] Certify you wrote the patch or otherwise have the right to pass it on as an open-source patch by signing all
commits. (`git commit -s`). (If needed, use `git commit -s --amend`).  The author email must match
the sign-off email address. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#sign-your-prs)
for more information.
- [x] Referenced issues using `Fixes: #00000` in commit message (if applicable)
- [ ] no tests are needed
- [ ] [Documentation](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/docs/README.md) has been updated (or no documentation changes are needed)
- [x] All commits pass `make validatepr` (format/lint checks)
- [ ] [Release note](https://github.com/kubernetes/community/blob/master/contributors/guide/release-notes.md) entered in the section below (or `None` if no user-facing changes)

Fixes [#27653](https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/27653)

This PR deduplicates the removal logic for quadlet and .app files when removing an application group.
Previously, removing a single .app file (e.g. `podman quadlet rm .nginx-test.app`) caused multiple internal removal attempts for the same files.

Now, each quadlet and asset file is only removed once, thanks to map-based tracking.

I've tested the change with print statements and confirmed that removal is now clean and efficient.
Note: debug prints are removed

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?
```
None
```

I noticed that all three modifications were to the same file. I need to use `git rebase -i HEAD~3` to compress it into a single commit. Additionally, you can refer to this file to add API testing.
https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/test/apiv2/36-quadlets.at

> Additionally, you can refer to this file to add API testing. https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/test/apiv2/36-quadlets.at

Should I create a new `.at` file for it, or add it to `test/apiv2/36-quadlets.at` ?

> > Additionally, you can refer to this file to add API testing. https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/test/apiv2/36-quadlets.at
> 
> Should I create a new `.at` file for it, or add it to `test/apiv2/36-quadlets.at` ?

The testing process should be added to the `test/apiv2/36-quadlets.at`. Also, since your code modifications are all based on the same file, you need to use `git rebase` to compress it into a single commit.
Cool. `git rebase` is done. Working on the test.
you need to use `git rebase -i HEAD~3` to  squash it into a single commit.

😯
https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/27654/checks?check_run_id=57026699401
  5629f77e65 "Refactor: Apply lint fixes, restore deleted comments, refine error handling, and add tests for quadlets" ... FAIL
  - FAIL - commit subject exceeds 90 characters

and then `git rebase -i HEAD~2` to squash them into a single commit. This will into a vim command, should edit the second line `pick` to `s` and save it, then edit the commit message and save

My apologies, I missed that. Thanks.
Looks good now.
